name: kiosk-mode
description: Hides the Home Assistant header and/or sidebar
author: Steven "NemesisRE" Koeberich <nemesissre@gmail.com>

scripts.test:tag: pnpm reset:ha && pnpm demo && pnpm tag:playwright && pnpm stop:ha
scripts.start:playwright: docker run -e CI=true --rm --network host --add-host host.docker.internal:host-gateway -v $(pwd):$(pwd) -w $(pwd) -i mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v$(jq -r '.devDependencies["@playwright/test"]' package.json)-jammy sh -c "npx playwright test"
scripts.tag:playwright: docker run --rm --network host --add-host host.docker.internal:host-gateway -v $(pwd):/$(pwd)/ -w $(pwd) -i mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v$(jq -r '.devDependencies["@playwright/test"]' package.json)-jammy sh -c "npx playwright test --grep @testing --trace on"
scripts.test:ci: pnpm test:clean && pnpm demo && pnpm start:playwright && pnpm stop:ha
scripts.test:all: pnpm lint && pnpm test:ts && pnpm test:ci
scripts.reset:ha: git add .hass/config/.HA_VERSION && git checkout .hass/config && git clean -fd
